columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous
columns.extraction_plan: While the trial population included a high proportion of newly diagnosed (synchronous) metastatic patients (94% as per Table 1, page 5), the results are not reported by synchronous versus metachronous as distinct prognostic groups. The reporting is for the overall metastatic population and then stratified by "metastatic disease risk group" (low-risk/high-risk), which is a different classification.
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Synchronous

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous
columns.extraction_plan: The trial population included relapsing (metachronous) patients (6% as per Table 1, page 5), but the results are not reported by synchronous versus metachronous as distinct prognostic groups. The reporting is for the overall metastatic population and then stratified by "metastatic disease risk group" (low-risk/high-risk), which is a different classification.
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Metachronous

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume
columns.extraction_plan: The results are reported based on a "high-risk" metastatic disease group, which is defined by criteria commonly associated with high volume/burden of metastases (≥3 bone metastases; visceral metastases; Gleason score ≥8, as stated in the "2.3 Procedures" section on page 4). Table 3 on page 8 presents "Primary and Secondary outcomes, by metastatic disease risk group using LATITUDE criteria" with a dedicated column for "High-risk". The Abstract on page 3 also mentions "metastatic disease risk group: 48% high".
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | High volume

columns.column_name: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
columns.extraction_plan: The results are reported based on a "low-risk" metastatic disease group, which represents patients not meeting the criteria for high-risk disease (as defined in the "2.3 Procedures" section on page 4). Table 3 on page 8 presents "Primary and Secondary outcomes, by metastatic disease risk group using LATITUDE criteria" with a dedicated column for "Low-risk". The Abstract on page 3 also mentions "metastatic disease risk group: 44% low".
columns.column_name_raw: Reporting by prognostic groups - Y/N | Low volume
